A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python (call_dZL0yKzYLtqcfwFfdQ2nFMmd), the agent filtered contents by sample_repo_name being a Swift repo and chose the max "copies" from those rows—using sample_repo_name directly—rather than first finding the globally most-copied file ID and then mapping that ID to a Swift-language repository, resulting in uacaps/PageMenu instead of the ground-truth SwiftAndroid/swift.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@
